trivia_bullets.text: Territory Culler is part of Modern Horizons 3 (MH3), released June 14, 2024 — a non-rotating draft-innovation set injecting directly into the Modern card pool. MH3 is the first Modern Horizons set to include Commander decks alongside the main release; Eldrazi and energy were the two dominant mechanical pillars.
sources: EDHREC: Modern Horizons 3 Set Review — Colorless Eldrazi

trivia_bullets.text: Territory Culler is, as of MH3, the only Eldrazi creature with the Landfall keyword — a combination not found on any previous Eldrazi printing. Landfall originates in the Zendikar block (2009), the plane where the Eldrazi were imprisoned; pairing the two mechanics in a non-Zendikar set is a deliberate design callback.
sources: Scryfall: type:eldrazi oracle:landfall search — single result

trivia_bullets.text: Arrives as a 7/5 with Reach for {4}{G} alongside Devoid. The Landfall trigger offers selective library filtering: on a creature hit, may take it; on a miss, may bin it — useful for creature-heavy Commander brews. EDHREC rank 8,495 places it in dedicated Eldrazi or Landfall Commander builds rather than competitive play.
sources: EDHREC rank from Scryfall API data field edhrec_rank

trivia_bullets.text: Illustrated by Tiffany Turrill, a horror-register MTG contributor whose card credits span Dominaria United and Duskmourn. No Hipsters of the Coast artist spotlight found for Turrill as of May 2026.
sources: WebSearch: site:hipstersofthecoast.com Tiffany Turrill — no results

trivia_bullets.text: Card was previewed by Javier Dominguez, two-time Magic World Champion (2018, 2021), via his personal social media on 2024-05-28.
sources: Scryfall API: preview field (source: Javier Domínguez, previewed_at: 2024-05-28)
